---
title: "Talks and Workshops"
listing:
  contents:
    - "metadata.yml"
  type: grid
  date-format: "DD MMMM YYYY"
  fields: [date, title, event, recording, author, slides, extsite, repo]
  template: /talk/talk-listing.ejs
  sort: "date desc"
  feed: true
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    css: /talk/talks.css
filters:
  - fontawesome
---

## Upcoming

### May 13 - 18 | PyCon US | Long Beach, CA

Come join me and other Posit folks at Booth #738! [Register for PyCon US here](https://us.pycon.org/2026/).

### June 16 | R/Pharma GenAI Day | Virtual

Thinking about boosting your skills in (LLM) skills? Join us to learn more! I'll add the link to register once it's available.

## Past

Subscribe to event recaps: <a href="https://ivelasq.rbind.io/talk.xml" target="_blank"><i class="fa-sharp fa-solid fa-rss"></i></a> {{< fa cat >}}
